components.name: Data Sourcing Module
components.description: Queries external data sources to retrieve raw lead or entity records

components.name: Extraction Layer
components.description: Parses and pulls structured fields from raw API or web responses

components.name: Normalization Pipeline
components.description: Cleans, deduplicates, and standardizes extracted records into a consistent schema

components.name: Scoring Engine
components.description: Applies configurable criteria to rank or filter records by relevance

components.name: Storage Layer
components.description: Persists scored records to a structured data store for retrieval and reuse

components.name: Downstream Delivery Layer
components.description: Exposes or exports processed records to consuming systems (CRM, spreadsheet, webhook)

triggers.description: Scheduled execution via automation platform on defined interval

actions.name: search_sources
actions.description: Query external data APIs with defined search parameters

actions.name: extract_data
actions.description: Pull structured fields from raw API responses

actions.name: apply_scoring
actions.description: Score each record against configurable criteria

actions.name: store_results
actions.description: Write scored records to data storage

actions.name: deliver_downstream
actions.description: Push or expose results to downstream consumers

dependencies.name: External data APIs
dependencies.role: Primary data source for record retrieval

reusable_modules.name: Configurable Search Connector
reusable_modules.description: Generic module for querying any structured external API with parameterized inputs

reusable_modules.name: Field Extraction Template
reusable_modules.description: Maps raw API response fields to a target schema via a user-defined mapping config

reusable_modules.name: Normalization Pipeline
reusable_modules.description: Applies deduplication, formatting, and validation rules to any record set

reusable_modules.name: Scoring Engine
reusable_modules.description: Assigns scores to records based on weighted criteria defined per use case

reusable_modules.name: Storage Adapter
reusable_modules.description: Writes records to any configured storage backend

reusable_modules.name: Output Exporter
reusable_modules.description: Formats and delivers results to downstream consumers via webhook, file, or API push
